scripts.dev: npm run sync:desktop-manifests && npm run sync:manager-updates && npm run sync:vercel-redirects && next dev --port 3001
scripts.validate:release-contract: npm run validate:release-manifests && npm run validate:manager-update-metadata && npm run validate:manager-update-links:strict && npm run validate:manifest-links && npm run validate:public-contract && npm run validate:docs:live-status
scripts.validate:release-contract:strict: npm run validate:release-manifests && npm run validate:manager-update-metadata:strict && npm run validate:manager-update-links:strict && npm run validate:manifest-links && npm run validate:public-contract
scripts.prebuild: npm run validate:release-manifests && npm run validate:manager-update-metadata && npm run validate:manager-update-links && npm run sync:desktop-manifests && npm run sync:manager-updates && npm run sync:vercel-redirects && npm run generate:rss
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run validate:release-contract && npm run validate:docs:live-status
scripts.validate:release-contract:local: npm run validate:release-manifests && npm run validate:manager-update-metadata && npm run validate:manager-update-links
